title: Tonacatepeque Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tonacatepeque with a Z-Score of +4.43. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tonacatepeque is at a critical level, with a Z-Score of +4.43 indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The temperature is causing a high cooling degree day (CDD) of 14.5 GG, while the heating degree day (HDD) is at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36% and the wind speed is 6.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the extreme temperatures.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
